# Content Pull Request

## Pull Request Type

## Checklist

- [ ] The change preserves a clear personal voice.
- [ ] Draft or placeholder copy was removed.
- [ ] Links, dates, and references were checked.
- [ ] No credentials, private URLs, or local-only paths were added.
